scripts.encrypt: rm -rf dist-protected && mkdir -p dist-protected && cp -r dist/. dist-protected/ && staticrypt dist/index.html --short --password "$STATICRYPT_PASSPHRASE" --template-title "Formation Kubernetes" --template-instructions "Saisissez la passphrase communiquée par le formateur." --template-button "Accéder au cours" -d dist-protected
scripts.build:protected: pnpm run build && pnpm run encrypt
scripts.serve:protected: rm -rf dist-serve && mkdir -p dist-serve/${REPO_NAME:-formation-k8s-slides} && cp -r dist-protected/. dist-serve/${REPO_NAME:-formation-k8s-slides}/ && pnpm dlx serve dist-serve
